criteriaResults.evidence: pure mapAuditToFindings: critical->severity 5/urgency 5, important->3/3; every object FindingSchema.parse-validated; stable title '[security] <vulnClass> at <path>:<line>'; evidence flattening + fallbacks; 12/12

emitSecurityFindings never throws (throwing sink swallowed+logged); wired at gate + CLI AFTER verdict/exitCode, guarded by security.hub; hub:false -> zero sink calls; verdict/exitCode unchanged in all cases; 22/22 gate + 30/30 CLI
real file-backed FactStore in mkdtemp: same finding emitted twice -> 1 active row (same-now NOOP + later-now supersede cases); proven end-to-end at both gate and CLI boundaries against real facts.db
no z.object in security-hub.ts; only hub import is `import type { Finding } from '../hub/finding.js'`; src/hub/ untouched; minor/approvedAreas never emitted
build+tsc clean, lint 0 errors, suite 313 files / 4043 tests (+24); existing hub tests pass unmodified

filesChanged.description: mapAuditToFindings + emitSecurityFindings + SecurityFindingSink; local sha256 deriveFindingId replica per research-runner precedent
optional SecurityGateInput.findingSink; emitFindingsToHub after parse-failure check, outside Promise.race, guarded by config.security.hub; lazy FactStore w/ finally close
no-op findingSink added to 9 pre-existing call sites (fixes real /tmp/project side-effect risk; stray facts.db artifact deleted) + 6 new hub tests
optional deps.findingSink; emitFindingsToHub after parsed check before thresholdVerdict; reuses deps.now

commits: 5b9a214 - bober(sprint-6): emit security audit findings into the priority hub
notes: security-auditor-agent.ts untouched (two-caller design keeps the core free of hub imports, preserving the Promise.race time-box). Discovered+fixed genuine side-effect: pre-existing gate tests use hardcoded '/tmp/project' root; unguarded hub emission would have written real sqlite there — injected no-op sinks (additive) and deleted the stray artifact. TS pitfall documented: let-in-closure narrowing to never; solved with early-return + const store.
